# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myVNet"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "East US"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subnetName": "default",
    "storageServiceEndpoint": "Microsoft.Storage",
    "sqlServiceEndpoint": "Microsoft.Sql"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.0.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "service": "[variables('storageServiceEndpoint')]",
                  "locations": [
                    "[parameters('location')]"
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "service": "[variables('sqlServiceEndpoint')]",
                  "locations": [
                    "[parameters('location')]"
                  ]
                }
              ],
              "delegations": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "name": "mystorageaccount",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "virtualNetworkRules": [
            {
              "vnetResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
              "subnetId": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/', variables('subnetName'))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-11-01-preview",
      "name": "mysqlserver",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "networkAclRules": [
          {
            "name": "vnetrule",
            "id": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'mysqlserver'), '/firewallRules/vnetrule')]",
            "properties": {
              "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
              "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
              "virtualNetworkRuleId": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/', variables('subnetName'))]"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
